revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Allocated between pre-opening activities (recognized when satisfied) and IP access (straight-line over term). Stand-alone selling price estimated via adjusted market assessment approach.
revenue_recognition.continuing_fees: Sales-based; recognized when franchisee sales occur and fee deemed collectible. Entirely related to IP use.
revenue_recognition.gds_booking_fees: Recognized at point-in-time when services rendered
revenue_recognition.transfer_fees: Due when transfer occurs; recognized at point-in-time

accounting_policy_mechanics.contract_costs: Incremental costs (commissions) capitalized and amortized over franchise agreement term
accounting_policy_mechanics.depreciation_amortization: Not applicable — no fixed assets or amortizable intangibles on balance sheet
accounting_policy_mechanics.deferred_franchise_fees: None — no over-time franchise fee revenue in any period

license_agreement.note: No license fee has ever been charged — this is a latent cost that could be activated

tax_structure.provision: No income tax provision — all items pass through to member

subsequent_events.material_events: None requiring recognition or additional disclosure
subsequent_events.note: The post-FY Texas termination is mentioned in Item 20 footnote but not in the financial statement subsequent events note

other_material_observations: No allowance for doubtful accounts — management assessed all AR as collectible
Cash declined from $100,444 at beginning of operations to $19,493 at end of 2024
Member distributions (~$51K) nearly equal net income (~$55K) in 2024 — minimal capital retention
Entity started with $78,839 in member contributions (2022) and received $12,600 more in 2023; no contributions in 2024
